title: Parkio Daily for July 17, 2026
teaser: Animal Kingdom tests new rope drop procedures; D23 Day at Disneyland set for August 13; Hollywood Studios debuts Animation-inspired experience.

rides.name: Guardians of the Galaxy: Cosmic Rewind

breaking.title: Animal Kingdom Testing New Rope Drop Setup
breaking.body: Animal Kingdom began testing new rope drop procedures this week, holding guests on Discovery Island rather than the Oasis entrance area before park opening.

parkioInsight.text: If testing continues, arriving 30 minutes before opening may no longer get you closer to Flight of Passage. Plan to move quickly once ropes drop from Discovery Island instead.

bignews.title: D23 Day at Disneyland Set for August 13
bignews.body: Disneyland will host D23 Day on August 13, one day before the D23 Expo begins in Anaheim. The fan event will feature special entertainment, activities, and storytelling experiences across the resort.

parkioInsight.text: August 13 will likely see some of the heaviest Disneyland crowds of the summer. If visiting that day, prioritize Lightning Lane purchases and arrive before rope drop to maximize ride time.

bignews.title: Disney Animation Experience Coming to Hollywood Studios
bignews.body: A new Disney Animation-inspired experience is coming to Hollywood Studios, designed to recreate the Burbank studio campus and showcase characters leaping from screen to real life.

parkioInsight.text: No opening date announced yet, but this addition may shift crowd patterns toward Animation Courtyard once it debuts. Keep an eye on official announcements for timing.

bignews.title: Disney Jr. Let's Play Party Returns to California Adventure August 13
bignews.body: Disney Jr. Let's Play Party returns to California Adventure on August 13 with entertainment and activities themed to Disney Jr. shows and characters, continuing into a second day.

parkioInsight.text: Families with preschoolers may find California Adventure a better bet than Disneyland on August 13, with dedicated character meet opportunities and shows during the event.

topstories.title: Three New Rice Bowls Debut at Sunshine Seasons
topstories.body: Sunshine Seasons in EPCOT added three new rice bowl options to its quick-service menu, including pork carnitas, plant-based alternatives, and customizable toppings.

parkioInsight.text: Sunshine Seasons tends to have shorter lines than World Showcase quick-service spots during lunch. Worth trying if you're in Future World between 11am and 1pm.

topstories.title: Create-Your-Own Popcorn Opens at Disney Springs
topstories.body: A new create-your-own popcorn experience launched at Disney Springs, offering customizable flavor combinations without requiring a park ticket.

parkioInsight.text: Disney Springs parking is free and the shop is likely less crowded before noon. Good option if you're staying on property and want a snack run without burning park time.

topstories.title: Parisian Breakfast Buffet Returns to EPCOT Food and Wine Festival
topstories.body: The Parisian Breakfast Buffet with bottomless mimosas will return to Chefs de France during the 2026 EPCOT Food and Wine Festival, with reservations now open.

parkioInsight.text: Book early if interested—this buffet typically sells out within days of reservations opening. Starting your EPCOT day with breakfast here often means shorter waits for Test Track afterward.

topstories.title: Spider-Man-Inspired Products Launch Ahead of Film Release
topstories.body: New Spider-Man merchandise is rolling out across Disney Parks ahead of Sony Pictures' Spider-Man: Brand New Day theatrical release this summer.

parkioInsight.text: Limited-edition Marvel merch tends to move fast at flagship stores like World of Disney. Stop by early in your trip if you're a collector.

topstories.title: Two Construction Projects Progress at Hollywood Studios
topstories.body: Multiple construction zones remain active at Hollywood Studios this week, with work continuing on unannounced projects near Animation Courtyard and backstage areas.

parkioInsight.text: Construction noise near Sunset Boulevard tends to peak mid-morning. If you're planning a sit-down meal or rest break, head to BaseLine Tap House or Hollywood Brown Derby after 1pm for quieter conditions.

topstories.title: Mickey's of Glendale Returns to D23 Expo with Imagineering Collection
topstories.body: Walt Disney Imagineering's Mickey's of Glendale booth will return to D23 Expo 2026 with a new collection of exclusive merchandise for fans attending the August event.

parkioInsight.text: Imagineering collectibles at D23 often sell out on day one. If you're attending the expo, prioritize the Mickey's of Glendale booth within the first two hours of opening.

icymi.title: DOLE Whip Day Recipes Released Online
icymi.body: DOLE released three official DOLE Whip recipes online for DOLE Whip Day, allowing fans to recreate the Disney Parks treat at home.

icymi.title: Ice Gator Cookie Available at Blizzard Beach
icymi.body: Blizzard Beach is selling prepackaged Ice Gator sugar cookies at Lottawatta Lodge, themed to the water park's mascot.

icymi.title: Disney Lorcana Attack of the Vine Release Event Tomorrow
icymi.body: Disney Springs will host a Disney Lorcana release event tomorrow, July 16, with a free promo card for guests and an artist signing for the new Attack of the Vine card set.

icymi.title: Magical Dining Month Includes Disney World and Universal Restaurants
icymi.body: Several Disney World and Universal Orlando table-service restaurants are participating in Magical Dining Month 2026, offering discounted three-course meals at participating locations.

spotlight.title: EPCOT Your Best Bet for Low Waits Today
spotlight.body: EPCOT is showing consistently lower wait times across major attractions this week compared to Magic Kingdom and Hollywood Studios. Test Track, Guardians of the Galaxy, and Soarin' are all seeing walk-on or near-walk-on windows in the first 90 minutes after rope drop.

parkioInsight.text: EPCOT crowds usually stay lighter until World Showcase opens at 11am. Knock out Future World attractions before lunch, then shift to food and drink in World Showcase as ride waits climb.
